overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene at night, following a character in a light-colored jacket walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character descends a curved outdoor path with manicured trees and modern architecture, pauses to observe a large illuminated building, then enters a covered tunnel walkway with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved outdoor promenade with manicured gardens

events.description: character turns right to face a large futuristic building with illuminated edges
character turns back toward the path and continues walking toward tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down a curved ramp, pausing to observe the architecture, then continuing toward a tunnel

entered.detail: low-rise modern structure with clean white facade and multiple windows
stylized trees with horizontal branching patterns illuminated by ground lights
curved silver metal handrail following the path's edge
tall multi-tiered dark structure with glowing white accent lines and industrial details
curved entryway with illuminated threshold leading into covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a curved outdoor pathway at night, bordered by metal railings and illuminated manicured trees. At around 12 seconds, the character turns to observe an imposing futuristic building with glowing architectural details before turning back and approaching a tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered pedestrian tunnel with panoramic windows

events.description: character enters the covered tunnel from the outdoor promenade
other pedestrians become visible walking through the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic tunnel with curved ceilings, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction
distant figure walking ahead in the tunnel corridor

entered.detail: smooth white curved ceiling with geometric patterns and embedded circular lights
large panoramic glass windows offering views of the illuminated trees outside
recessed circular lighting fixtures providing even illumination
smooth white architectural wall panels with integrated lighting strips

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered tunnel, the character walks along a smooth pathway with curved white ceilings and recessed lighting. Large windows on the right side offer views of the illuminated trees outside. Other pedestrians appear walking in both directions through the futuristic corridor as the character progresses deeper into the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open-air futuristic promenade into a sleek, enclosed pedestrian tunnel. It begins with the character walking down a curved outdoor pathway bordered by metal railings and illuminated manicured trees under a night sky. As the character pauses to observe an imposing building with glowing architectural details, the camera follows their gaze before turning back to approach a tunnel entrance. The scene then shifts indoors, transitioning from the open air to a smooth corridor characterized by curved white ceilings and recessed lighting. Finally, the perspective moves deeper into the futuristic tunnel, passing other pedestrians while large windows on the right maintain a visual connection to the glowing trees outside.
